originalTitle: At $499, Apple’s M3-powered iPad Air is a good deal
summary: Most of Apple’s price increases have gone into effect, resulting in iPads and other products costing hundreds more than they did a few days ago. If last week’s Prime Day sale wasn’t a good time to consider buying an iPad, we found a deal worth considering that’s just under $500 right now. The 128GB iPad […]
content: Most of Apple’s price increases have gone into effect, resulting in iPads and other products costing hundreds more than they did a few days ago. If last week’s Prime Day sale wasn’t a good time to consider buying an iPad, we found a deal worth considering that’s just under $500 right now. The 128GB iPad Air that has the M3 processor, plus both Wi-Fi and 5G cellular support, costs $499 at Best Buy. At just $50 more than the base iPad (now $449, up from $349), it’s a significantly faster and all-around better tablet. [Product: 11-inch iPad Air M3 | https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fapple-11-inch-ipad-air-m3-chip-built-for-apple-intelligence-wi-fi-cellular-128gb-space-gray-unlocked%2FJJGCQ8VCFQ] While the last-gen Air matches the base iPad’s 11-inch screen size, the Air has a laminated, antireflective coating, plus a wider color gamut. In other words, it’s the better choice for entertainment or for creating content. In terms of specs, its M3 processor leaps ahead of the A16 with more cores, not to mention Apple Intelligence support (as well as support for iPadOS 27 coming later this year). It also boasts Apple Pencil Pro support. It stacks up well compared to the newer M4 Air, too, which now starts at $749 for the Wi-Fi model, and a whopping $899 for the cellular. The M3 processor is only slightly slower, it has 8GB of memory instead of 12GB, and its wireless radio is older, but it’s otherwise nearly identical, for much less money. $500 for the M3 Air is a steal. Read our iPad Air (M3) review.
chineseTitle: 苹果 M3 驱动的 iPad Air 售价 499 美元，非常划算
chineseSummary: 苹果的大部分涨价已经生效，导致 iPad 和其他产品的价格比几天前上涨了数百美元。如果上周的 Prime Day 促销不是考虑购买 iPad 的好时机，那么我们发现现在值得考虑的优惠价格略低于 500 美元。 128GB iPad [...]
chineseContent: 苹果的大部分涨价已经生效，导致 iPad 和其他产品的价格比几天前上涨了数百美元。如果上周的 Prime Day 促销不是考虑购买 iPad 的好时机，那么我们发现现在值得考虑的优惠价格略低于 500 美元。配备 M3 处理器、同时支持 Wi-Fi 和 5G 蜂窝网络的 128GB iPad Air 在百思买的售价为 499 美元。它的价格仅比基础版 iPad 贵 50 美元（原价 349 美元，现在 449 美元），它是一款速度明显更快且全面更好的平板电脑。 【产品：11英寸iPad Air M3 | https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fapple-11-in ch-ipad-air-m3-chip-built-for-apple-intelligence-wi-fi-cellular-128gb-space-gray-unlocked%2FJJGCQ8VCFQ]虽然上一代 Air 与基础 iPad 的 11 英寸屏幕尺寸相匹配，但 Air 具有层压抗反射涂层，以及更宽的色域。换句话说，它是娱乐或创作内容的更好选择。就规格而言，其 M3 处理器凭借更多核心超越了 A16，更不用说 Apple Intelligence 支持（以及对今年晚些时候推出的 iPadOS 27 的支持）。它还支持 Apple Pencil Pro。与较新的 M4 Air 相比，它也表现出色，后者现在 Wi-Fi 型号起价为 749 美元，蜂窝型号起价高达 899 美元。 M3 处理器只是稍微慢一点，它有 8GB 内存而不是 12GB，而且它的无线电设备更旧，但在其他方面几乎相同，而且价格要便宜得多。 500 美元的 M3 Air 太便宜了。阅读我们的 iPad Air (M3) 评论。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
